heading: Review of world-wide supply, demand, and price of basic raw and processed materials
label: 2686 Review of world-wide supply, demand, and price of basic raw and processed materials

children.label: A
children.text: the supply, demand, and price of each such material in each major importing, exporting, and producing country and region of the world in order to understand long-term and short-term trends in the supply, demand, and price of such materials;

children.label: B
children.text: projected imports and exports of such materials on a country-by-country basis;

children.label: C
children.text: unusual patterns or changes in connection with the purchase or sale of such materials;

children.label: D
children.text: a list of such materials in short supply and an estimate of the amount of shortage;

children.label: E
children.text: international geological, geophysical, and political conditions which may affect the supply of such materials; and

children.label: F
children.text: other matters that the Secretary considers appropriate in carrying out this section.
